words.meaning_en: A person who treats sick people
words.example_sentence: The doctor gave him medicine for fever.

words.meaning_en: A hard hat worn to protect the head
words.example_sentence: Always wear a helmet while riding a bicycle.

words.meaning_en: A person receiving medical treatment; also meaning calm and not hasty
words.example_sentence: The patient waited quietly in the hospital.

words.meaning_en: A building where sick people are treated
words.example_sentence: He was taken to the hospital after the accident.

words.meaning_en: A substance taken to treat an illness
words.example_sentence: Take this medicine three times a day.

words.meaning_en: A condition in which the body temperature is higher than normal
words.example_sentence: She stayed home because she had a fever.

words.meaning_en: A strip of cloth used to cover a wound
words.example_sentence: The nurse put a bandage on his injured hand.

words.meaning_en: Physical activity done to keep the body fit
words.example_sentence: Morning exercise keeps you healthy.

words.meaning_en: A substance used with water for washing
words.example_sentence: Wash your hands with soap before eating.

words.meaning_en: An unexpected event that causes damage or injury
words.example_sentence: A car accident blocked the road for an hour.

words.meaning_en: A vehicle used to take sick or injured people to hospital
words.example_sentence: The ambulance arrived within minutes of the call.

words.meaning_en: A sudden noise made when air is forced out of the throat
words.example_sentence: She had a bad cough due to the cold.

words.meaning_en: The process of getting food needed for health and growth
words.example_sentence: Good nutrition helps children grow strong.

words.meaning_en: A medicine injected to protect against disease
words.example_sentence: Children are given a vaccine against polio.

words.meaning_en: An instrument used to measure body temperature
words.example_sentence: The nurse used a thermometer to check his fever.

words.meaning_en: Keeping yourself and your surroundings clean to stay healthy
words.example_sentence: Good hygiene prevents the spread of germs.

words.meaning_en: A reaction the body has to certain foods or substances
words.example_sentence: He has an allergy to pollen and dust.

words.meaning_en: A small medical place where a doctor sees patients
words.example_sentence: She went to the clinic for a check-up.

words.meaning_en: The food and drink a person regularly consumes
words.example_sentence: A balanced diet keeps you healthy.

words.meaning_en: A sudden burst of air forced out through the nose and mouth
words.example_sentence: He sneezed because of the dust.

words.meaning_en: A person trained to care for sick people in a hospital
words.example_sentence: The nurse gave the patient his medicine.
